papers.title: Time-like electromagnetic form factors of $Λ,~Σ$ and $Ξ^{+}$ in a light-front quark model
papers.abstract: We use the light front quark model to investigate the form factors in the $e^{+}e^{-} \to B\bar{B}$ collision proceses with $B=Λ,~Σ$ and $Ξ$. These form factor behaviors are calculated based on the Bethe-Salpeter formalism with $q^{+} > 0$ to effectively account for non-valence contributions. We show that our results of the $q^2$-dependent form factors closely match the BESIII data. In particalar, we obtain that $|G_{eff}| = (0.921,~0.098,~0.189$) and $R =|$$G_E\over G_M$$|= (0.97,~0.89$,~$0.936$) for $e^{+} e^{-}\to Λ\barΛ$,~$Σ^{+} Σ^{-},~Ξ^{+} Ξ^{+})$ which $q^2 = (5.74,~6.0,~7.0)$ GeV$^2$.
